top_signals.title: BP’s High-Stakes Reboot Has Descended Into Ugly Boardroom Drama
top_signals.summary: When Albert Manifold was hired as chairman of BP Plc, he joked to friends the company needed a “gurrier” — Irish slang for a savvy and scrappy streetfighter — to help turn its fortunes around.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ChatGPT share links abused to host fake outage pages to deliver malware
top_signals.summary: Threat actors are abusing ChatGPT's content-sharing feature to display fake OpenAI outage pages that direct users to download malware disguised as the ChatGPT desktop application. [...]

top_signals.title: C.H. Robinson Is Removing Carriers Based on Safety Scores. A Supreme Court Decision Two Weeks Ago May Explain Why.
top_signals.summary:
A notice has been going out to carriers in the C.H. Robinson network, and it is worth reading carefully because of what may sit behind it. The message, branded under C.H. Robinson and titled “Changes to carrier eligibility,” tells the recipient that their company “exceeds intervention thresholds for C.H. Robinson’s scoring model based on data […]

The post C.H. Robinson Is Removing Carriers Based on Safety Scores. A Supreme Court Decision Two Weeks Ago May Explain Why. appeared first on FreightWaves.

top_signals.title: LDP and CRA agree on debate schedule for fiscal 2026 supplementary budget
top_signals.summary: The budget committees of both the upper and lower houses will each spend one day deliberating the extra budget for the fiscal year that started in April.
